prompt_preview:
You are a data quality engineer for a European power market pipeline that fetches hourly data from ENTSO-E Transparency for the German (DE) bidding zone.

SCHEMA (column → dtype):
{
  "da_price": "float64",
  "load_mw": "float64",
  "wind_onshore_mw": "float64",
  "wind_offshore_mw": "float64",
  "solar_mw": "float64"
}

DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS:
       da_price   load_mw  wind_onshore_mw  wind_offshore_mw  solar_mw
count  10080.00  10080.00         10080.00          10080.00  10080.00
mean      6
